{{Quote|No man is that powerful.|Yanne to Kueller about Luke Skywalker|<ref name="tnr">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>}}
'''Yanne''' was [[Kueller]]'s assistant after [[Femon]] who was chosen because he expressed his opinion even if it was not in sync with Kueller's.<ref name="CSWE" /> After Kueller's death in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], Yanne assumed control of [[Almania]] and opened talks with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, he was soon overthrown by [[Gant]],<ref name="The Essential Chronology real-world book">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> an assistant Kueller had trained to replace Yanne.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
''The Essential Chronology'' calls him "Yane." ''Star Wars Encyclopedia'' and ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'' refer to him as "Yanee."
